reviews.title: Unresponsive to my need to cancel
reviews.text: I booked my hotel on Agoda, and missed the deadline to cancel by a few minutes, (as I developed a bad fever), so I need to cancel my trip. I was only a few minutes late to cancel, and Agoda told me the hotel would help, and the hotel refused to cancel, so I had to pay for the night. I tried to explain to the hotel the situation, and let them know I would not be coming, and although it would have been super easy to be understanding of my situation - I had a doctor's note, they said there was nothing they could do. I found this very inhumane and will not recommend this hotel because they did not try to assist me when I had a fever. Would they have preferred I travel with a fever and get their staff sick? If they are reading this, and would like to compensate me for the cost of my 1 night, that would be the right thing to do.

reviews.title: 硬件设施不达标致孩子受伤，五星级体验落空
reviews.text:
带着孩子入住香港天际万豪酒店，本想享受五星级应有的舒适与安心，没想到从踏入大堂起，这份期待就被彻底打破。  

刚拖着行李进门，女儿（十多岁）想在大堂沙发稍作休息，谁知刚一坐下就突然皱轻呼跳了起来！原来沙发坐垫塌陷严重，她直接摔坐到坚硬的支撑结构上，尾椎撞得生疼，眼泪一下子就涌了出来。

我们后来进房间查看，发现她屁股内侧淤青了一片，走路都一瘸一拐，疼得直抽气。虽说没伤到骨头，但孩子遭罪不说，后续行程也被搅得一团糟，我们夫妻俩全程提心吊胆，原本美好的旅行从这第一分钟就变了味。  

事后向酒店投诉，第二天我发现那个坏掉的沙发被挪到了柱子后面。我立刻找前台询问："这样放客人还是会不小心坐到啊。"前台解释说是"受八号风球预警影响，暂时没办法马上更换"。听完有些无奈——八号风球确实是香港常见的极端天气预警，酒店需要优先处理防风防汛等紧急事项，这点我们能理解。但大堂作为公共区域，损坏的沙发哪怕暂时移到角落，依然存在安全隐患，而酒店似乎没有进一步提醒或防护措施。作为五星级酒店，硬件设施的日常维护本就是基础，出现明显损坏后，除了"暂时挪开"，是否也该有更主动的解决方案？比如明确标注"损坏勿坐"，或加快维修进度？  

这次经历让我们深刻感受到，五星级酒店不应只靠装修和定价定义，更该体现在每一个细节的用心。大堂沙发这样的基础公共设施，舒适与安全本就是底线，可这家酒店不仅任由损坏沙发长期存在，导致孩子受伤，后续处理也显得被动。若连最基本的客人和孩子安全都无法保障，确实辜负了"五星级"的期待。  

也提醒其他带孩子的家庭留意类似情况，谨慎选择。希望酒店能重视这类问题，真正把客人的体验与安全放在心上，避免更多人遇到同样的困扰。  

差评。

I have tried to contact hotel again after 15 days not seeing refund shown in my credit card, and the lady told me the accounting department will review my case and call me back soon. Of course, no response as well. 
Not an honest hotel, no one is helping to slove problem, what they do is pushing problem to someone else, or no response.. Will not recommended this hotel ...

The staff was much more concerned with up-selling services that should be included and excusing their lack of hospitality as hotel policy, than they are with guest needs and comfort.  Let's not even discuss the surprise no smoking policy that had me sitting on the sidewalk outside the lobby rather than relaxing in my room or in a comfortable outside area set aside for the purpose.  I couldn't even take a walk around the hotel after dinner without being accosted by security.  I spend one-half of my life traveling for business and this is the singular, most horrible experience I've ever had. Never again will I stay at a Marriott.

This was at 10 pm
And still our room was not ready. When i booked via agoda i couldve chosen 2 adults as the price was much cheaper but chose to declare properly 4 adults. This was a mistake. Will never book this hotel again. Front desk is supposed to be acvomodating and friendly not rude and stressful. Very bad experience with your people. Also because we had a problem with the front desk girl ***, they didn’t answer our calls and allowed our calls to just ring without anyone answering. I tried around 20 times to call for help becUse we needed a plug charger conversion/adapter, but no one took our calls until the next shift or morning. Very BAD PEOPLE. We pay so much only to be shortchanged.

While my friend is taking a shower, the bottle of conditioner is empty (the opaque container we cannot check before a shower). So I called the front desk and waited again. The lady kept saying they do not provide small bottles now. I said I don't mind if you want to give us a large bottle, but we need the conditioner now, and my friend is in the shower. reviews.title: SkyCity Marriott doesn't even pretend to try.  Because they know you're stuck.
reviews.text:
There is only one reason that anyone ever stays at an airport hotel: Because they need a convenient, efficient place to sleep between flights.   SkyCity Marriott fails to provide this-- and gets away with it simply because it knows  that there are only 3 airport hotels in Hongkong, and you're only there because the other two are booked.
-Worst example: Hotel is 5 minutes from the terminal-- but it only runs a shuttle once every 30 minutes.  Any decent airport hotel has its shuttles on nonstop relay.
-Another example: I've stayed there twice (why?  because I had to).  Both times the check-in took forever.  And I'd already paid through Agoda.  Why so slow?  Because desk was understaffed.  Why?  Because Marriott knows you have no other options.
-Another example: You arrive from a flight about  9pm, want to feed your kids dinner & get to bed.   The restaurant is nearly empty-- but staff say that it will be a very long wait for food.  And it is.   Why?  Because Marriot doesn't care.

reviews.text:
Not very recommendable. 
First location and shuttle - to go to HK or Kowloon you have to take hotel bus or taxi to mtr and ride mtr. The shuttle going out seems less of problem but going back to hotel at 9pm is always full and no additional rides. considering the location i think need more shuttle bus i stayed 3 nights and only managed to get on one time. (other times line was cut infront of me). So you have to be there early to get on at time when most of people come back to hotel. Also i was waiting for shuttle from airport to hotel, a big bus came and crews were getting on bus was around 40 seater and only 5-6 people on. There was my family with 2 kids, another family and few people waiting for shuttle and asked that big bus if we ride this one driver said wait. So we waited 15 min and bus was suppose to come every 10,30,50 (?) and it was 12:10 and no sign of shuttle, called the hotel and they said it is on the way. 10 min later a small shuttle bus came. Couldn't we have gotten on the same big bus? wasted 25 min with luggage. Hotel says there is shuttle bus, but not very punctual nor useful.
Breakfast restaurant service not very nice i was waiting to be waited to table. Waited for about 10 min with no attendance so i went into restaurant asking for table the guy said very frustratedly it is all full!! and gave me last table right infront of the entrance. We checked inside and found more than 4 empty tables asked another lady and she asked us to sit there. i understand it could be busy but it does not mean we should take up the bad service? (some incident while check in, but i am checking with agoda to clarify) it is hotel job to manage to maintain reasonable service. i have few more but limited space, overall don't recommend. Good thing was room cleaning was fine and bed was comfortable.

reviews.title: Mixed Experience at Hong Kong SkyCity Marriott: Convenient Location but Service Issues
reviews.text:
I stayed at the Hong Kong SkyCity Marriott with my mom and brother for two days after arriving from Macau, before traveling back to the Philippines. We chose this hotel for its shuttle bus service to the airport and Tung Chung Station, which was convenient for our plans to visit Disneyland.

Unfortunately, our experience with the staff, particularly at the reception, was less than satisfactory. We arrived at 11 PM, exhausted, and found the check-in process to be less smooth than expected. The hotel offers complimentary shuttle buses, but there was a lack of assistance regarding which bus to take. We ended up waiting an hour for the shuttle, missed our bus, and had to wait for the next scheduled departure because the staff failed to keep us informed.

Our room,  featured a comfortable king-sized bed, a clean room, and a well-maintained bathroom. However, it lacked a notable view and was located far from the elevator, requiring a lengthy walk down the hallway.

On a positive note, the buffet breakfast offered a wide variety of food options, which was a highlight of our stay.

In summary, while the hotel's location and amenities are beneficial, the service shortcomings and logistical issues affected our overall experience.

reviews.title: Disappointing service for a supposed 4 & 1/2 star
reviews.text: For a start, not being able to check in until 3.45pm is ridculous.  And, don't use the excuse "we were full last night and most people had requested a late check-out, sorry". Easy - if you're going to be full the next night, don't allow late check-out - simple enough.  Then, don't say "oh, just wait". Hello.... We're at the airport miles away from the city - wait where? Oh, in the foyer - that's full.  Perhaps, offer a drink at the bar.  That didn't happen.  Not even a tea or coffee.  Then have your staff just walk around and look at us, grinning.  Maybe, it would have even helped to have the front desk staff come and tell us our room was ready, we were 10 metres away.  No way, far too simple - just let us guess. After all we'd only been on the plane for hours and just had to hang around in the 8 seats available in the 'foyer area'.  Expect that at a back-packers but SG$270 a night is to much to pay for that kind of treatment. Won't be staying again and in no hurry to stay at any Marriott. Only saved by the room service lady that gave us an extra coffee...

reviews.title: 服務好，但人手極不足夠的酒店
reviews.text:
房間小，但裝修豪華，景觀不及機場富豪酒店！check-in, check-out ，晚餐，行李服務都非常好！room service order 了all day breakfast but missing the baked beans and toast, asked the waiter to bring back, she seemed that she didn't know what were we talking about, know nothing about the content of the meal. Finished the meal and asked them to clean the table, they said that will come within 20 mins, finally nobody comes. Asked for the spa menu, then they replied that somebody will bring to room after 30 mins.

Before checking out, called the front desk and asked the service guy to prepare the bill, but no bill was prepared while checking out, the girl said that maybe on other people's hand.

 5 stars pricing  and 3.5 stars level.

Shuttle bus in every 20 mins which is not convenient to go to airport.

reviews.title: Not the best Marriott property
reviews.text:
I have been to several marriott properties with my travel and the SkyCity Hong Kong one is disappointing. We paid a total of 11,000php a night for a hotel that 
1. Does not have a ready available person to help with your luggage
2. You need to call 5x to get ice (note that there are instructions to call if you need ice) 
3. Lets the guests be the one to load and unload their luggage to and from the bus guests like us needed to crawl under the luggage space to get our luggage. The driver was not helpful

reviews.title: Something to work on for a 4.5- or 5-star hotel
reviews.text:
Clean rooms and the indoor pool lovely - we were lucky to land on the first day of the pool re-open after the restrictions.
There are a few things though that were not very pleasing or satisfactory: 
The location is surrounded by construction work and there is apparently no outdoor areas to go to. It is also far from all shopping areas. The 2-every-hour shuttle bus taking us to Tung Chung which takes more than 10 mins kind of make it up. While that's the limitation that can't really be worked on, two other areas can be. 
One is the inconsistency of staff performance at the gym. While we met a very welcoming male staff the second day (April 1),  a lady at the gym counter made it like it was a sin when we showed up there a bit before 7pm on March 31 (oh she was consistent as she looked even ruder on the next day) - no smile, blunt tone, and when telling us about no admission for anyone under 16 she was more like one worked for the police than a serving person. No "we're sorry about that" with a smile or suggestion of what else our 13 boy may do. That brings me to my second point. Marriott should truly consider what they can do for children or teenagers staying in their premises. Adding a game room - with basketball shooting machine, air hockey tables or even a ping pong table - will not be difficult especially at this time of very few customers and many spare rooms. It's time they thought of ways to attract family customers as there are many family rooms (unlike the Novotel nearby).

The next day, we check the pool just to take few lictures and we were followed by their hotel staff again.   Upon seeing the pebbles the kids grab few of them and theow it to the pool which immediately stop.  However,  the stop still approached our kid to warn them.  Our kids were a little bit traumatize by stranger approaching and warning them so I called their attention..  i inform the lobby aboit the incident and we have not receive any action except a reply that they will investigate.   The place was nice but not conducive for family with kids.  I will not returm to this hotel again.

reviews.text: Our stay was pleasant.  Was a bit disappointed by the cleanliness of the room.  It was dusty in the bathroom (perhaps it hadn't been used for a while) and the bath didn't drain very well so the water filled up when having a shower.  Staff very friendly and helpful.  A number of restaurants to choose from but disappointed the Bar/Grill didn't open until 6pm.  Service at the Lounge bar was a little slow.  Rooms very comfortable.  Great pillows!!!!
reviews.positives: Location for Asia World Expo, Airport, Free shuttle to airport

reviews.title: Good location to stay for a layover at Hong Kong airport.
reviews.positives: Location to the airport was perfect, and they provided a shuttle as long as you arrived before 12:45 am (or 00:45). I think we would have had to take a taxi if we arrived any later than that. Overall the hotel was quiet and the breakfast was good, they had tons of different options, they had both western themed items (like eggs, bacon, waffles, pancakes) and Asian inspire options (noodles in broth, various dumplings, etc). Once we arrived at Hong Kong airport, you do have to exit the airport to get to the hotel so you have to fill out a declaration form and go through immigration, and then make sure you have your next boarding pass to enter back into the airport after staying at the hotel.
reviews.negatives: The check in got a little confusing, I didn't realize that they place a deposit on your card when you check in so I got concerned when I got charged significantly more than what I was expecting at check in, but it was only because it was a deposit, the amount corrected itself once we checked out and the charge went through. Just something that maybe wasn't super clear to me. But other than that, the hotel was a really nice spot to stay for a long layover.
